title: I have tried every AI and a few grew my portfolio
author: Next-Syrup6935
selftext:
https://preview.redd.it/2fbu9xtsn9xf1.png?width=588&format=png&auto=webp&s=95df8aa67f482ad1784a689b6e83eea30d928313

  
It's crazy how no1 uses AI w/ trading..  
AI > Humans when it comes to numbers

AI does not have emotions.

Litterly the two components needed to go pro trading.

[This](http://tickrad.com) after trying many different shitty ones i came across.

I'm not saying that it's the best one but after trying a bunch, i cant find any better.

comments.author: tirolerben
comments.body: You mean you "came across" this trading AI agent that you yourself developed according to your previous posts?
